= Sample Copa 2024 =

Group A

Matchday 1

(1) Fri Jun/14 20:00  Argentina  2-0  Canada  @ MetLife Stadium
(2) Fri Jun/14 22:00  Peru  0-1  Chile  @ AT&T Stadium

Matchday 2

(3) Tue Jun/18 20:00  Canada  1-1  Peru  @ MetLife Stadium
(4) Tue Jun/18 22:00  Chile  2-2  Argentina  @ AT&T Stadium

Quarter-finals

(5) Sat Jun/29 21:00  Argentina  1-1 a.e.t.  Chile  @ Levi's Stadium

Third place play-off

(6) Sat Jul/13 18:00  Peru  1-1  Canada  @ Hard Rock Stadium

Final

(7) Sun Jul/14 21:00  Argentina  4-2 pen. (1-1)  Chile  @ Hard Rock Stadium
